name: Sharrkan
description:
Height: 180cm  
Likes: feasts   
One of the eight generals, he has terrific skills in fencing. He is a poseur. He has a personality to not do anymore work after off-duty. He also goes drinking often. His optimistic personality changes into a violent personality during sword practice. Because of his extreme fondness for fencing, he often gets into fights with Yamuraiha. Because he thought it was cool, it became a habit of his to bring a girl he likes to the sword forgery.   (Source: Wikipedia)
